name: Claude Sonnet 5
description: Claude Sonnet 5 is Anthropic's latest Sonnet-class model, released on 2026-06-30 with adaptive thinking enabled by default, a 1M-token context window, and 128k maximum output tokens.

details.name: reasoning
details.value: Adaptive thinking is enabled by default; extended thinking is not supported.

details.name: availability
details.value: Available in the Anthropic API, Claude Code, Claude apps, Anthropic Console, Amazon Bedrock, and Google Cloud Vertex AI.

details.name: pricing
details.value: Introductory pricing is $2 per 1M input tokens and $10 per 1M output tokens through 2026-08-31, then standard Sonnet pricing of $3 per 1M input tokens and $15 per 1M output tokens.

details.name: tokenizer
details.value: Claude Sonnet 5 uses a new tokenizer; Anthropic reports text-heavy workloads may see approximately 1.0x to 1.35x token-count changes compared with prior Claude models.
